title: About me (and this website)
subhead:
Hi, I'm Sean. I am a professional (full-stack) software developer with a variety of interests. In short: I like to build stuff.
One of my biggest projects right now is building this website, where I aim to document the things I build and provide guides on how to reproduce my journey.

title: snen.dev: A technical overview
subhead: I tinker with the React 18 release candidate's new features in a framework-less Deno environment

title: Streamlining visual design using React when you are bad at colors
subhead: In which I build a debugging tool to experiment with my app theme.
